errors.infrastructure_error_cause: PostgreSQL container restart due to sandbox hibernation — not application fault

memory.rss_trend: STABLE — no growth pattern (peak was initial warm-up, settled to ~106MB)

conclusion: No memory leaks, no connection pool exhaustion, no file descriptor leaks. 16M+ operations over 2.4 hours with 100 concurrent workers. All metrics stable. Infrastructure errors (1797) caused by PostgreSQL container restart during sandbox hibernation — not an application defect.
